Background

Operations experience,
built inside real rentals.

I spent over a year as the Executive Virtual Assistant for Aqua Pearl Escapes — a boutique vacation rental company in Panama City Beach, Florida — managing their entire STR operation remotely from the Philippines.

Before that, I led a 15+ person team at TDCX on the Airbnb BPO account, handling complex guest and host escalations, writing SOPs, and building the kind of structured systems that keep operations from falling apart.

I understand short-term rentals from both sides: the platform level (policies, guest expectations, ranking algorithms) and the operational level (turnovers, vendor coordination, owner reporting).
